scripts.desktop:test: npm run prepare:electron --workspace @auto-typer/desktop && tsc -p apps/desktop/tsconfig.test.json && node apps/desktop/electron/device-link.test.mjs && node apps/desktop/electron/serial-wifi-link.test.mjs && node apps/desktop/electron/group-execution-watchdog.test.mjs && rm -rf apps/desktop/dist-test
